top_findings.summary: The skill requires at least one third-party LLM API key (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini) and sends potentially sensitive user data (daily notes, session transcripts containing conversations, decisions, and personal preferences) to external services for processing without a clear local-only alternative. While this may be necessary for its core AI-based extraction features, it constitutes data collection beyond what is strictly needed for a local memory consolidation system. Additionally, the skill accesses the entire workspace directory and user's agent session transcripts, which could include highly sensitive information, and automatically uploads this data to third-party LLM APIs without explicit per-session user consent beyond initial API key configuration.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection & Privacy Violation - The skill requires at least one third-party LLM API key (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini) and sends potentially sensitive user data (daily notes, session transcripts containing conversations, decisions, and personal preferences) to external services for processing without a clear local-only alternative. While this may be necessary for its core AI-based extraction features, it constitutes data collection beyond what is strictly needed for a local memory consolidation system. Additionally, the skill accesses the entire workspace directory and user's agent session transcripts, which could include highly sensitive information, and automatically uploads this data to third-party LLM APIs without explicit per-session user consent beyond initial API key configuration.
